canonical_definition: A natural language processing tool used to perform dependency parsing on generated text to identify and count active (nsubj) and passive (nsubjpass) subjects for analyzing grammatical agency.

definitions.text: A natural language processing tool used to perform dependency parsing on generated text to identify and count active (nsubj) and passive (nsubjpass) subjects for analyzing grammatical agency.
spaCy, a natural language processing toolkit used for dependency parsing in the analysis pipeline.

characterization: A natural language processing tool used to perform dependency parsing on generated text to identify and count active (nsubj) and passive (nsubjpass) subjects for analyzing grammatical agency.
